description_long: This table features a striking geometric design, with a square wooden tabletop supported by an inverted pyramid-shaped wooden base. The base is framed and stabilized by a black metal structure that forms a rectangular outline around the pyramid, giving the table a modern, architectural appearance. The wood grain is visible on all surfaces, adding a natural texture and warmth to the otherwise minimalist form. The tabletop appears thick and sturdy, with clean, sharp edges and a seamless finish. The metal frame is sleek and matte, contrasting with the organic look of the wood. This table would serve as a bold accent piece in urban environments such as lobbies, galleries, or outdoor plazas.
description: A modern table with a square wooden top and an inverted pyramid base framed by a black metal structure, combining natural wood grain with sleek metal lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop, the full face of the wooden pyramid base, and the black metal frame outlining the structure.
description_view_1: Side view with the same geometric features, highlighting the symmetry and the depth of the pyramid base within the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, again showing the pyramid base and the metal frame, with subtle wood grain variations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, emphasizing the table's consistent design and the interplay between wood and metal.
attribute_number_of_legs: central inverted pyramid with metal frame support
